manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v55

- Added a "Places" option in search.
- Added bottom buttons to share audios to stories, use them when seeing them from another story or save them when seeing them from reels.
- Added a forward button next to your voice messages for quicker sharing.
- Added an avatar option in voice chats (doesn't seem to work for now, feel free to provide feedback).
- Minor changes and clean-ups.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
